tagged_types.name: linux_i2c_interface_record
tagged_types.code: type linux_i2c_interface_record is new i2c_interface_record with private;

documentation.description:
Configure the I2C interface on a BeagleBone Black or other systems that
have multiple functions on the I2C pins.  This configuration procedure
sets the pins to the I2C function.

access_types.name: linux_i2c_interface
access_types.code: type linux_i2c_interface is access all linux_i2c_interface_record'Class;

documentation.description:
Configure the I2C interface on a BeagleBone Black or other systems that
have multiple functions on the I2C pins.  This configuration procedure
sets the pins to the I2C function.

-------------------------------------------------------
Definitions for object oriented interface.

The I2C interface object

subprograms.name: configure
subprograms.code: procedure configure(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; i2c_file : string)

documentation.description: Reading or writing a single byte is straightforward.

subprograms.name: configure
subprograms.code:
procedure configure(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; i2c_file : string;
                    SCL : string; SDA : string)

documentation.description:
Configure the I2C interface on a Raspberry PI or other systems that have
 dedicated pins for the I2C interface.  This would also work on a system
 with shared pins if the pins had already been set to the I2C function.

subprograms.name: read
subprograms.code:
function read(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
              error : out err_code) return uint8

documentation.description:
When reading two bytes, is the MSB first or second?  There is no standard
 even within a single device.

 Read a word with MSB first

subprograms.name: read
subprograms.code:
procedure read(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
               size : buff_index; error : out err_code)

documentation.description:
Close the I2C interface when done.  Once this is called, the
  I2C object will need to be re-configured.

subprograms.name: readm1
subprograms.code:
function readm1(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
              error : out err_code) return uint16

documentation.description: Read a word with MSB second (LSB first)

subprograms.name: readm2
subprograms.code:
function readm2(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
              error : out err_code) return uint16

documentation.description: Write a word with MSB first.

subprograms.name: write
subprograms.code:
procedure write(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
                size : buff_index; error : out err_code)

documentation.description: Read the specified number of bytes into a buffer

subprograms.name: write
subprograms.code:
procedure write(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
                data : uint8; error : out err_code)

documentation.description:
When reading two bytes, is the MSB first or second?  There is no standard
 even within a single device.

 Read a word with MSB first

subprograms.name: writem1
subprograms.code:
procedure writem1(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
                data : uint16; error : out err_code)

documentation.description: Write a word with MSB second (LSB first).

subprograms.name: writem2
subprograms.code:
procedure writem2(self : in out linux_i2c_interface_record; addr : addr7; reg : uint8;
                data : uint16; error : out err_code)

documentation.description: Write an arbitrary number of bytes to a device on the i2c bus.
